top_signals.title: Euro-Zone Growth Is Buckling Under Weight of War Impact, EU Says
top_signals.summary: The euro area will slow markedly while suffering the fastest inflation since 2023 as it succumbs to the energy-cost surge from the Iran war, according to the European Commission.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran War Spurs Bear Scenarios for Asia FX, Bonds
top_signals.summary: The Iran war is piling pressure on emerging Asian markets, pushing some currencies and bond yields toward levels once considered unlikely.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Stocks Steady as Traders Await Hormuz Progress: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: US equities held gains while oil fell and bonds ticked higher as traders waited to see whether hopes of a peace deal in the Middle East would translate into tangible progress.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: War Weighs on Global Growth With Inflation Worries Intensifying
top_signals.summary: The global economy is showing signs of waning momentum and mounting inflation pressures during its third month of a war-induced energy crunch.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Firms accelerate job cuts as 12-month growth run ends
top_signals.summary: Firms have accelerated job cut plans across the private sector as a 12-month run of business growth has come to an end, new data has revealed.  Employers have now slashed headcount levels in each of the last 20 months, with the pace of job shedding in May coming at a faster pace, S&P Global researchers [...]
